title: Patient Safety in the Era of AI: Draft Conditions for the Design of Safe Care
summary: Draft national framework for AI patient safety. EdgeCDSS gap analysis against these conditions drove our session audit logging and confidence indicator roadmap.

title: An Evaluation of LLM Inference on Popular Single-Board Computers
summary: Benchmarks 25 quantized open-source models on Pi 4, Pi 5, and Orange Pi 5 Pro. Directly informs EdgeCDSS Offline hardware selection: SBCs reliably support models up to 1.5B parameters.
